text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The New Year had begun. Buena Vista moved
up into the Classic class. And at last, her
challenge toward the Triple Tiara was about
to begin.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: —Trainer? Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The sukiyaki's ready! Let's eat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the New Year, I'd been invited to Buena
Vista's home, spending a quiet, relaxing time.
Right now, we were enjoying sukiyaki together.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Go on, have as much as you like. If you space
out, Buena will eat them all, you know?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ah, hey! Come on, I'm not that much of a
glutton! …Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Haaah… that was so good.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… Seeing you two sitting there like that,
so relaxed side by side… It really brings back
memories.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I thought it might be difficult this year… but
I'm really glad you could come, <username>.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
I thought it might be difficult this year… but
I'm really glad you could come, <username>.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't worry about it. Take it easy and stay
as long as you like. Things have been busy
lately, haven't they?

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Buena tells me about it on the phone. Things
like, "Trainer seems really busy lately," or,
"I wonder what kind of late-night snacks
would be best…"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: M-Mom…!
choice_data_list: Buena… thanks for worrying about me.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …No. I'm not worried, okay?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Because I trust you.
…You know that, right?

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text: …You two really are close.

text_block_list.name: Buena's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me… The elementary school
nearby is opening up their gym for New Year's
calligraphy. Why don't you two go check it out?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we headed to a nearby elementary
school. Buena Vista had brought along a
calligraphy set she used as a child, but…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yep! It's the one you gave me back in
elementary school.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The brush is still in great condition, so I
thought I could keep using it.
choice_data_list: You really kept it all this time…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I've always taken good care of it.
Look, even the name label…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the calligraphy set, next to the sticker with
my name on it, "Buena Vista" had been written
beside it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
It just felt like a waste to cover it up, you
know?
choice_data_list: Thanks for taking such good care of it.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe, of course! Alright, let's write.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the start of her important Classic year,
what resolution will Buena Vista choose?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll be taking on tougher training from here
on out. Wanting her to be able to endure it,
I put my heart into writing: "Build Stamina."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Ah, that—!
It's exactly the same as mine…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Training's only going to get more intense,
right? So I figured I should build up my
stamina.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe… what an amazing coincidence!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Above all else, her well-being comes first.
Hoping she stays healthy, I carefully wrote:
"Health First."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Ah, that—!
It's exactly the same as mine…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Racing is tough, after all. I thought I should
prioritize my health first.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe… what an amazing coincidence!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista's overall ability is already at a
high level. So I thought she could benefit
from having a unique edge, and wrote:
"Master of Many Skills."

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Ah, that—!
It's exactly the same as mine…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Since it's a special occasion, I thought I'd
write something fun.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe… what an amazing coincidence!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
When we get back to the academy, let's hang
these up in the trainer's office together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we spent a little more time relaxing
at Buena Vista's home… And on the way back
to the academy…

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Huh!? B-Buena!? Wow, it's really her…!
…Ah, h-happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year! Um, you all are…?

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
W-we're fans of yours, Buena…! Ah, r-right!
Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Huh? Congratulations… for what?

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: Oh! There's this super famous voting site among racing fans… The 1st… here, this one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What they showed us was the most
authoritative fan voting site in racing. For
each race, fans vote on who they want to
support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A way to visualize, with surprising accuracy,
"who carries the most expectations"… And on
that site, Buena Vista…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For the Oka Sho, she was ranked as the
number one favorite.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Oooh…!

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
We voted for you too, Buena!
Everyone's really looking forward to it…!

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
If it's you, Buena, we believe you could
become the third Triple Tiara horsegirl…!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Oka Sho, Oaks, and Shuka Sho.
Anyone who wins all three is known as
a Triple Tiara horsegirl.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the long history of the Twinkle Series, only
two have ever achieved it…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ramonu, and Still in Love.
Aside from these two great legends,
no other horsegirls holds that title.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The Triple Tiara… Me…!?

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text: If it's you, Buena, you can definitely do it～!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
…But if it's you… I'd love to see you go for
the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: The Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe, too…!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but if she goes for the Arc, she wouldn't
be able to run in the Shuka Sho, since the
timing overlaps…

text_block_list.name: Student B
text_block_list.text:
What!? No way, no way! I have to see Buena
win the Triple Tiara!

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text: Ugh… I want to see that too!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Hehe. You all really know about racing,
don't you?

text_block_list.name: Student C
text_block_list.text:
Ah! S-sorry… We're just putting our own
expectations on you…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Not at all, it makes me happy, you know?
If anything, I want to hear even more!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The more expectations you place on me, the
more I have to carry… and the bigger my
dreams become. And that's a truly wonderful
thing!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hey… the Triple Tiara, they say.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you think I can do it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buena Vista's dream, the view she seeks, is something that's meant to reach everyone. If expectations are placed on her, then she wants to rise to meet them.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Maybe that's where my view lies.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Tiara… I think the view from there
would be something that makes your heart
tremble, like the breathtaking sight Spe
showed us.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: What do you think? Can I make it there?
choice_data_list: Either way, you don't plan on losing, right?
Either way, you don't plan on losing, right?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Of course.
…My heart's already made up.
choice_data_list: Let's go for it, the Triple Tiara!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Yeah. I'll give it everything I've got.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(Once I get back to the dorm, I'll go over my
training plan…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah—!?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry, I ran right into you…!
Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: —Wait… Desire!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(Red Desire. My classmate, with that distinct,
striking presence. And…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Sorry, are you really okay? That must've hurt…

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm fine. I should apologize as well,
I wasn't paying attention.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…By the way, Buena. Did something good
happen today? Your aura… it's positively
radiant.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Something good…? Yeah, a lot, actually!
Hehe, was it that obvious?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Of course. Your brilliance is immense… like
the sun of this world.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to meeting you on the turf.
In the days when the three jewels shine…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Three jewels…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah—! The Triple Tiara!
